nasb.text: I will stand on my guard post And station myself on the rampart; And I will keep watch to see what He will speak to me, And how I may reply when I am reproved.

esv.text: I will take my stand at my watchpost and station myself on the tower, and look out to see what he will say to me, and what I will answer concerning my complaint.

cnv.text: 我要站在哨崗，立在城樓， 留心看耶和華在我裡面說甚麼， 怎樣使我答覆自己的怨訴。

ccb.text: 我要登上瞭望塔， 站在望楼上等候， 看耶和华要对我说什么， 要怎样答复我的抱怨。
